zh.Chorlton cum Hardy, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾霍爾頓 姆 哈代
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Worsley 4th Lord of Worsley於1240年出生在英國藍卡爾沃斯利時，他的父親Richard de Worsley24歲，母親Maud de Wardley21歲。他於大約1293年與Margaret de Shoresworth在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1304年在他的家鄉享年64歲。

zh-hans.Chorlton cum Hardy, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾霍爾頓 姆 哈代
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Worsley 4th Lord of Worsley于1240年出生在英国藍卡爾沃斯利时，他的父亲Richard de Worsley24岁，母亲Maud de Wardley21岁。他于大约1293年与Margaret de Shoresworth在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1304年在他的家乡享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Worsley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Worsley in Lancashire or Worsley Farm in Rock (Worcestershire). The Lancashire placename may derive from an Old English personal name Weorcgȳth (genitive Weorcgȳthes) + Old English lēah ‘wood, woodland clearing’. The Worcestershire placename may take its name from a lost stream-name Worf + Old English lēah.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Worsley 4th Lord of Worsley was born in 1240, in Worsley, Lancashire, England, his father, Richard de Worsley, was 24 and his mother, Maud de Wardley, was 21. He married Margaret de Shoresworth about 1293, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1304, in his hometown, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Worsley 4th Lord of Worsley est né en 1240, à Worsley, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Worsley, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Maud de Wardley, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Shoresworth environ 1293, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1304, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Worsley 4th Lord of Worsley 1240 in Worsley, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Worsley 24 und seine Mutter Maud de Wardley 21. Er hat um 1293 in England Margaret de Shoresworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1304 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Worsley 4th Lord of Worsley è nato il nel 1240 nel Worsley, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Richard de Worsley, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Wardley, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Shoresworth circa 1293, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1304, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Worsley 4th Lord of Worsleyが1240年にイギリスランカシュアイアウオルスリーで生まれた時，父Richard de Worsleyは24歳，母Maud de Wardleyは21歳であった。約1293年にイギリスでMargaret de Shoresworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1304年に故郷で64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Worsley 4th Lord of Worsley(이)가 1240년 영국 랭카실르 워슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Worsley(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Wardley(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1293년 영국에서 Margaret de Shoresworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1304년 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Worsley 4th Lord of Worsley nasceu em 1240, em Worsley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Worsley, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Wardley, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Shoresworth aproximadamente 1293, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1304, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Worsley 4th Lord of Worsley родился в 1240 г. в местности ворсли, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Worsley было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Maud de Wardley, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Shoresworth около 1293 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1304 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Worsley 4th Lord of Worsley nació en 1240, en Worsley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Worsley, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Maud de Wardley, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Margaret de Shoresworth aproximadamente 1293, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1304, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años.
